_comment: ComfyUI API-format workflow: SD1.5 img2img (init image, NO inpainting, NO ControlNet).
Used by PrewarmGenerator (ADR-0008) to produce synthetic Reference Crops at startup
starting from the KPL reference photo. Closes the txt2img bias loop: the model's
fine-tune prior cannot collapse the gender/ethnicity away from what the original
image already conditions in the noised latent.
Privacy property: denoise is pinned to 0.9 by PrewarmGenerator; at this level only
coarse semantics (gender, ethnicity, age band, lighting) survive — fine facial
identity is destroyed. An anti-leak gate (cosine similarity to KPL face centroid)
rejects candidates above an operator-set ceiling.
Per-call fields patched by PrewarmGenerator: positive prompt (node 3), seed (node 9),
is absent — width/height are determined by the init image.

inputs.text: a person, photorealistic, centered portrait, face visible, looking at camera, warm skin tone, soft natural light, sharp focus
deformed, mutated, blurry, low quality, artifacts, watermark, text, hood up, face hidden, side profile, back view
